title: Upgrade chisel Beads packaging
description: Chisel currently packages code snapshots with GitHub issue and PR context, but local Beads task state is not comprehensively included. Add Beads-aware snapshot outputs so GPT-Pro packaging carries durable local issue, dependency, and readiness context alongside code and GitHub artifacts.
close_reason: Completed: chisel now exports Beads issue, readiness, dependency, memory, overview, audit, and index context.
